title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. gougetianum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. gougetianum is a lesser-known variety of the Hawkweed plant, a member of the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its small, yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. gougetianum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming the plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. gougetianum may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
